name: Crab Grande
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Velveeta Mexican Pasteurized Process Cheese Spread with Jalapeno Peppers -- cubed
8 ounces tomatoes, drained and cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, sauté onions in margarine until softened.
2. Add Velveeta Mexican cheese spread and tomatoes; stir until the cheese is melted.
3. Place tortilla chips on a serving platter.
4. Cover the chips with lettuce, olives, cheese mixture, and crabmeat.
5. Top with sour cream and guacamole.
